title: 1981-04-16_Pat_85.txt
key_claims: Dick reads about Philo and discovers Philo's theology (God $\rightarrow$ Logos $\rightarrow$ Forms) perfectly describes 2-3-74. Philo introduced the concept of *Pronoia*—God's absolute sovereign power to override natural law and determinism to save individuals.
He realizes that Western thought is an A-B-A dialectic:
The Logos is the "Idea of the Ideas" (Form of Forms) in God's intellect. The world is radically idealist—a complex thought in God's mind.

Suddenly, after watching footage from *Blade Runner*, Dick shifts paradigms: 3-74 was actually a journey through Dante's three realms. The BIP was a memory of Hell, time flowing backward was Purgatory, and hearing bells/seeing Valis was Paradiso.
recurring_concepts: **Gnosis as Data**: The concept that salvation requires "Data" fed to the intellect to trigger the meta-abstraction, moving beyond mere faith (pistis).
reading_excerpt: Dick reads about Philo and discovers Philo's theology (God $\rightarrow$ Logos $\rightarrow$ Forms) perfectly describes 2-3-74. Philo introduced the concept of *Pronoia*—God's absolute sovereign power to override natural law and determinism to save individuals.
